## Safety checklist
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, cookies, QR codes, account identifiers, browser profiles, or local databases are included.
- [ ] High-risk actions still require human confirmation or explicit allowlists.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, and test fixtures are redacted.
